description: A calendar modal for selecting travel dates appears on the screen.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: A white calendar modal titled 'Travel dates' is displayed over the Flight Centre homepage.

description: An advertisement for 'World360' loyalty program appears as an overlay on top of the calendar modal.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: A red and white advertisement for 'World360' loyalty program covers the calendar modal.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the close button (X) of the advertisement overlay.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'X' button in the top right corner of the advertisement overlay.

description: The user clicks the close button (X) to dismiss the advertisement overlay.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The advertisement overlay is being dismissed.

description: The advertisement overlay disappears, revealing the travel dates calendar again.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The calendar modal is visible again, showing February and March 2026.

description: The user hovers the cursor over various dates in the February 2026 calendar.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The cursor moves across the February calendar grid.

description: The user selects Wednesday, February 18, 2026, as the departure date.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The date '18' in February is highlighted as the departure date.

description: The user hovers the cursor over other dates in the calendar.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The cursor moves towards the return date selection.

description: The user selects Saturday, February 21, 2026, as the return date.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The date '21' in February is highlighted as the return date.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the 'Done' button in the calendar modal.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue 'Done' button at the bottom right of the calendar modal.

description: The user clicks the 'Done' button to confirm the selected travel dates.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The 'Done' button is clicked.

description: The calendar modal closes, and the selected dates are populated in the search widget on the homepage.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The calendar modal is closing, returning focus to the homepage search widget.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the 'From' location field, which is already set to 'Sydney, Australia'.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'From' field which contains 'Sydney, Australia'.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the 'To' location field.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'To' field which contains the placeholder 'Where to?'.

description: The user clicks on the 'To' location field to open the destination selection dropdown.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The 'To' field is clicked.

description: A dropdown menu with popular destinations appears below the 'To' location field.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The 'To' field is active, and a destination dropdown has appeared.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the 'Melbourne, Australia' option in the destination dropdown list.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Melbourne, Australia' option in the destination dropdown list.

description: The user selects 'Melbourne, Australia' from the destination dropdown.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The 'Melbourne, Australia' option is selected.

description: The destination dropdown closes, and 'Melbourne, Australia' is populated in the 'To' field.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The destination dropdown closes.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the 'Search flights' button.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue 'Search flights' button.

description: The user clicks the 'Search flights' button to initiate the flight search.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The 'Search flights' button is clicked.

description: The page navigates from the homepage to the flight search results page.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia
frame_description: The browser is navigating to the search results page.

description: The search results page displays a loading state with the message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' while fetching flight options.
